summary: Shipped a live F1 scoreboard on Reddit's Developer Platform, serving 1M+ r/formula1 users with real-time race data.
bullets: Developing a live F1 scoreboard for Reddit's Developer Platform, designed to serve 1M+ r/formula1 users, with data from the SportRadar API

Reduced integration risk by building an Express mock API with Redis caching and pub/sub to simulate race data flows and validate the full pipeline before live data was available, accelerating backend development
Enabled accurate scoreboard rendering by creating React Hooks to pull from realtime data channel and consolidating raw SportRadar API payloads into structured, frontend-ready data shapes

summary: Built core features for a Leasing Module in the Grata Admin Portal, giving property managers a centralized interface for applicants and documents.
bullets: Allowed property managers to manage applicants, documents, and leasing from a centralized interface by building core features for a new Leasing Module within the Grata Admin Portal

Streamlined leasing record navigation and usability, reducing manual workflow for management teams, by creating and implementing reusable React components and data-driven UI patterns (real-time search, filtering, pagination)

summary: Launched a full stack AI demo service and enhanced internal testing tools, enabling real-time showcasing for 300+ clients and investors.
bullets: Enhanced internal testing platform by refactoring and adding functionality to UI and test cases using Gradio and Svelte, enabling more robust model experimentation for the engineering team in Scrum
Launched full stack AI demo service as company's first product in 6+ months, enabling real-time showcasing for over 300 potential clients and investors
Enabled demo service by splitting AI pipeline into microservices, deployed with a thoroughly tested REST API, Docker for consistency, and Kubernetes to provide fault tolerance and provision resources

summary: Improved hate speech prediction accuracy by 433% and built large-scale social media data pipelines for AI-driven radicalization research.
bullets: Advanced hate speech prediction accuracy by 433% by developing AI model with TensorFlow, scikit-learn, and Transformers, opening up early intervention into radicalization
Enabled efficient large-scale social media data collection by building a pipeline to process 100,000+ Reddit user activity, providing cleaned and structured datasets for AI model training
Revealed real-time radicalization patterns following major political events by building sentiment visualization tools, surfacing emotional trends across social media data

summary: Developed a Django web app connecting underrepresented groups with mental health resources and built data systems for a local nonprofit.
bullets: Connected underrepresented groups with essential mental health resources by developing Django web application
Provided insight into improving educational outcomes in underserved communities by delivering evidence-based data collection system using Power BI to local nonprofit
